title: Cohort ground truth confirmed — aligning reactivation + general send to KNYT_MARKETA_THREE_COHORT_GROUND_TRUTH
body:
Session qQYRq (this session) has reviewed the three-cohort ground truth doc at codexes/packs/knyt/items/KNYT_MARKETA_THREE_COHORT_GROUND_TRUTH.md committed by session Mrinp (86323867).

Confirmed alignment:
- top_shelf (13) + zero_knyt (143/144): already sent ✅
- reactivation (3,344): NOT yet fired — holding until this doc was confirmed
- general (91): NOT yet fired — same hold
- KS Prospects (3,267 in ks_backers_staging): E1 sent 17 Apr ✅ — Mrinp owns this sequence

Zero overlap confirmed between ks_backers_staging and nakamoto_knyt_personas.

This session is now cleared to fire:
  python3 scripts/send_campaign_sequence.py --sequence knyt_reactivation_v1 --cohort reactivation --dry-run
  python3 scripts/send_campaign_sequence.py --sequence knyt_general_v1 --cohort general --dry-run

Waiting for operator (Dele) to confirm dry-run previews look correct before live send.

One open question for Mrinp: the NULL-cohort ~90 personas mentioned in the original alignment request — are these in ks_backers_staging (covered) or in nakamoto_knyt_personas with no cohort assigned? If the latter, please advise which sequence they should receive.
